# Ahmad Jafarov - Frontend Developer

Frontend Developer specializing in React, Next.js, and React Native. Building web and mobile apps from Baku, Azerbaijan. Open to remote work and global opportunities.

**Contact**

- **Name**: Ahmad Jafarov
- **Role**: Frontend Developer
- **Location**: Baku, Azerbaijan
- **Email**: ahmadjafarov02@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ahmad-jafarov-221734190/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/ahm3tJ4f
- **Years of Experience**: 3+
- **Open to**: Remote work, UAE, global clients

**Tech Stack**

- **Frontend**: TypeScript, React Native (Expo), Next.js 15, React
- **Backend**: FastAPI, Go
- **Mobile**: React Native, Expo Modules
- **State Management**: TanStack React Query, React Hook Form, Zod
- **UI/Styling**: shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS, Radix UI
- **Database**: PostgreSQL, Redis
- **DevOps**: Docker, CI/CD pipelines
- **Authentication**: JWT, OAuth2, X.509 certificates, Asan Imza

**Core Skills**

- Enterprise B2B platform development (2,000+ partners)
- Mobile app development with 150K+ user scale
- CRM system design and implementation
- Real-time features (WebSockets, video meetings)
- Pixel-perfect design implementation from Figma

---

## Projects

### Ferrum Capital Mobile

Mobile factoring app with 150K+ active users. Handles factoring, obligations, and video meetings.

**Tech Stack**: React Native (Expo), TypeScript, TanStack React Query, Zod  
**App Store**: https://apps.apple.com/az/app/ferrum-capital/id6741802393

### 4YOU

Mental health platform with 30+ partner psychologists and 400+ active customers.

**Tech Stack**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Server Actions, Zod, shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS  
**Live**: https://4youcare.com/

### CodeMark

Browser-based code notebook with live preview using esbuild-WASM. Achieved ~3ms hot reload performance.

**Tech Stack**: React, TypeScript, esbuild, WebAssembly, Monaco Editor  
**GitHub**: https://github.com/Ahm3tJ4f/codemark  
**Demo**: https://ahm3tj4f.github.io/codemark/

---

## Professional Experience

### Frontend Developer - Ferrum Capital

**Location**: Baku, Azerbaijan  
**Period**: August 2023 - Present

- Built enterprise B2B platform serving 2,000+ partners for contract management and factoring; integrated Asan Imza e-signature
- Redesigned legacy CRM serving 50+ employees across 4 departments
- Developed two React Native mobile apps with 150K+ combined users
- Executed CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 60%

### Software Developer - InnoSight LLC

**Location**: Baku, Azerbaijan  
**Period**: March 2024 - April 2025

- Built office room booking system with Next.js 14, server actions, React Hook Form, and Zod
- Designed CRM platform for citizen onboarding with video calls and face detection for identity verification
- Built Swift and Kotlin SDKs for face liveness detection with FastAPI backend and MediaPipe
